title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
method: Agent Laboratory is a framework that accepts human-provided research ideas and progresses through three stages: literature review, experimentation, and report writing to produce comprehensive research outputs, including a code repository and a research report. Users can provide feedback and guidance at each stage.
implementation: Agent Laboratory was deployed with various state-of-the-art LLMs. Multiple researchers participated in a survey to assess quality, provided human feedback to guide the research process, and evaluated the final papers.
findings: Agent Laboratory driven by o1-preview generates the best research outcomes
The generated machine learning code achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing methods
Human involvement, providing feedback at each stage, significantly improves the overall quality of research
Agent Laboratory significantly reduces research expenses, achieving an 84% decrease compared to previous autonomous research methods
